title: Vegan Portuguese Fish Fritters
description: Crispy on the outside and golden on the inside, these fritters are a delicious vegan take on traditional Portuguese fish fritters. Serve with a side of your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the tofu, cauliflower, panko breadcrumbs, lemon juice, garlic powder, and basil. Mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches (3.8 cm) in diameter and 1/2 inch (1.3 cm) thick.
Dip each patty into the breading mix, coating both sides evenly.
Heat about 1/2 inch (1.3 cm) of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add a few of the breaded patties to the skillet (do not overcrowd) and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer the fritters to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
